div.p: The City Manager in accordance with the System of Delegations of the CCT, Section 9(1) of the City Manager’s delegated authority, authorised an investigation into allegations of Unauthorised, Irregular or Fruitless and Wasteful (UIFW) expenditure and the mismanagement of funds.
To further the investigation, it is required to obtain access to the available email and OneDrive accounts for the following staff member:
It should be noted that EFS’ search criteria are limited to the email accounts of the staff member listed above and to determining whether:
EFS’s search criteria will include, inter alia, the following terms, and/or variations thereof:

EFS will utilise both the Microsoft Purview eDiscovery, as well as the Discovery Accelerator platforms to apply the above searches and review the electronically stored information that falls within the specified search criteria, in accordance with the authorisation granted.

In terms of the System of Delegations, approved by Council on 30 July 2025 (item C26/07/25), Part 28: (B) Section 25(10)(b), the City Manager in the performance of his functions and, “Subject to any relevant legislation, have access to, to copy and/or to seize any register, file, document, account, minute and/or other records, whether physical or electronic, of the City and/or any such register, file, document and/or record which may be maintained by any employee, in relation to the performance of his/her official functions.”

Under cover of this memorandum, please find for your review and signature a memorandum addressed to Mr Andre Stelzner, Chief Digital Officer: Information Systems and Technology, for his information and necessary action.
Feel free to contact me with any related comments/ queries.

I, the City Manager, in accordance with the System of Delegations of the CCT, Section 9(1) of the City Manager’s delegated authority, authorised an investigation into allegations of Unauthorised, Irregular or Fruitless and Wasteful (UIFW) expenditure and the mismanagement of funds.
To further the investigation, it is required to obtain access to the available email and OneDrive accounts for the following staff member:

In terms of the System of Delegations, approved by Council on 30 July 2025 (item C26/07/25), Part 28: (B) Section 25(10)(b), the City Manager in the performance of his functions and, “Subject to any relevant legislation, have access to, to copy and/or to seize any register, file, document, account, minute and/or other records, whether physical or electronic, of the City and/or any such register, file, document and/or record which may be maintained by any employee, in relation to the performance of his/her official functions”.

EFS will utilise both the Microsoft Purview eDiscovery as well as the Discovery Accelerator platforms to apply the above searches and review the electronically stored information that falls within the specified search criteria, in accordance with the authorisation granted.
You are accordingly hereby authorised to provide the requested information to Mr Investigator Name, Senior Forensic Officer, Ethics and Forensic Services, Office of the City Manager.
